module_info.docstring:
Tests for path traversal prevention in skill_view.

Regression tests for issue #220: skill_view file_path parameter allowed
reading arbitrary files (e.g., ~/.hermes/.env) via path traversal.

methods.name: test_dotdot_nested
methods.docstring: Nested .. traversal should also be rejected.

methods.name: test_legitimate_file_still_works
methods.docstring: Valid paths within the skill directory should work normally.

methods.name: test_no_file_path_shows_skill
methods.docstring: Calling skill_view without file_path should return the SKILL.md.

methods.name: test_symlink_escape_blocked
methods.docstring: Symlinks pointing outside the skill directory should be blocked.

methods.name: test_sensitive_file_not_leaked
methods.docstring: Even if traversal somehow passes, sensitive content must not leak.

functions.name: fake_skills
functions.docstring: Create a fake skills directory with one skill and a sensitive file outside.
